{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-01-09.
12,847 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-01-08 -> 2026-01-09)

- "Which country will become the first in the world to formally ban the AI chatbot Grok by 12 January 2026?"

- "Which country will face host Morocco in the AFCON 2025 semifinal in Rabat on 14 January 2026?"

- "Which economy will the United States' goods trade deficit with double in 2025, according to the annual trade report released by February 2026?"

  Brier: +0.02 | TW-Score: +1.75
- "What military body will President Rashad al-Alimi announce to integrate anti-Houthi forces into Yemen’s military by January 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Joint Operations Command: 0.20, Presidential Guard: 0.20, National Defense Council: 0.15, Unified Military Command: 0.15} | Truth: Supreme Military Committee

- "Who will Aryna Sabalenka face in the Brisbane International women’s singles final by January 11, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Elena Rybakina: 0.20, Iga Swiatek: 0.15, Coco Gauff: 0.10, Jessica Pegula: 0.10, Qinwen Zheng: 0.10} | Truth: Marta Kostyuk

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 331 (31 resolved, 300 active)
- accuracy: 1.5% | brier skill score: -0.006 | time weighted score: -262.06
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
